description.zh-cn: 短信营销活动：创建短信模板活动，向有手机号的会员分批群发营销短信，支持退订名单过滤、发送进度统计与 sms:campaign 定时命令。复用 NotifyCenter 的 easy-sms 通道，需先配置通知中心短信网关。
description.en: SMS marketing campaigns: create template-based campaigns, batch-send to members with mobile numbers, honor opt-out list, track progress, and run via sms:campaign. Reuses NotifyCenter easy-sms; configure SMS gateway in Notify Center first.
